title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know of the Ringo Custom Known as the eternal burial?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have heard... It is so cold here that bodies left out in coffins will stay preserved for hun- deeds of years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. And the markers used for these eternal graves are swords. Katanas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Some of them were famed meitou.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: such is Ringo. The land upon which we now stand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's going to bite us to death!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is it? Won't you even let me die in peace?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The beloved companion of the late Daimyo of Ringo, Ushimaru Shimotsuki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I... I have met you once before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... you protected all this

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the five years that had passed since Ringo fell,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Onimaru had fought, alone, against the evils of grave robbers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These swords would accompany them through their lives, and one day serve to mark their graves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: * A FOX's favorite food is fried tofu, right?*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For if you die, who will protect your master's grave?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 45 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
